strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and teaching background indicating communication and learning agility
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest experience beyond junior/mid-level, risking misalignment with role seniority
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services listed as preferred in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures, with a track record of building scalable systems and sharing knowledge—strongly aligning with the role’s technical demands—but his senior title, limited German proficiency, and absence of explicit PostgreSQL/AWS experience raise concerns about fit for an entry-level, on-site position in Berlin.
